svg.title: bioTCAD AI component map and expansion brainstorm
svg.desc: A diagram showing latent AI already in bioTCAD, plus expansion ideas across four directions: AI that feeds into bioTCAD, AI derivable from bioTCAD, AI for expanding bioTCAD, and wilder frontier ideas.
svg.text: Wild frontier — beyond the current scope
